name: Titan SBI Card

rewards.displayCategory: World of Titan, Taneira, Titan Eye+, Helios, Fastrack, Skinn, Irth, and Sonata

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter.
international: 4 complimentary international airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter, with complimentary Priority Pass membership for the first 2 years.

joiningBenefits: 12,000 Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of annual fee

milestones.label: Additional gift voucher worth Rs 5,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Additional gift voucher worth Rs 10,000 on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Additional gift voucher worth Rs 5,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Additional gift voucher worth Rs 10,000 on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions
additionalDetails: 4 Reward Points equal Re 1 for eligible reward redemption
internalNotes: Audited against official Titan SBI Card product page and Titan FAQ booklet on 2026-06-08.
Annual fee reversal is tracked only through feeWaiverSpend at Rs 3 lakh and is intentionally not repeated as a milestone.
The card's live SBI page frames Titan ecosystem value-back through a mix of cashback and gift-voucher benefits, so the rewards table uses separate display rows by Titan brand cluster.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
